extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIC Primož attacked early on the penultimate category 1 climb with BERNAL, dropped him on Lagos de Covadonga, won solo by 1:35 over teammate KUSS.
tactical_patterns: BERNAL attacked from distance on penultimate Cat 1 climb, forcing ROGLIC to chase alone without teammates, tactical error dragging leader.
ROGLIC chose to match BERNAL's early attack despite holding GC lead, taking unnecessary risks on wet descent to fight head-to-head.
KUSS sat on throughout climb conserving energy while leaders attacked, enabled sprint for 2nd and 6-second time bonus over LOPEZ.
EIKING chased aggressively after crash to defend jersey despite being dropped, lost red but honored leadership rather than abandoning.

rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: negative: attacked from distance on Cat 1 climb but faded badly on Lagos, losing 1:35+ after forcing the pace early
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primož: positive: willing to take risks on wet technical descent and match attacks despite GC lead, crushed rivals on final climb
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: positive: conserved energy by sitting on while ROGLIC worked, sprinted to 2nd place and 6-second bonus over tired climbers
rider_signals.SIVAKOV Pavel: negative: dropped early as Ineos domestique, unable to support BERNAL's aggressive strategy
rider_signals.MARTIN Guillaume: negative: complained about rib/hip/leg injuries from previous stage crash, expected to fall out of top 10
rider_signals.EIKING Odd Christian: positive: crashed early but chased flat out all day to minimize losses, fought to honor jersey despite inevitable loss
